positive: A stylized, symmetrical central emblem featuring an ethereal lunar fox surrounded by glowing, geometric celestial vines and crescent moons. The composition must be highly detailed yet maintain clean silhouettes suitable for apparel printing. Use a deep indigo and midnight blue color palette, contrasted sharply with brilliant gold and soft silver ink highlights. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau elegance and modern linework, evoking a sense of mystic wonder and peaceful magic. Intricate linework, high contrast, perfect symmetry, isolated on a solid background, graphic design, tattoo flash style, vectorized.
